.opencode/commands/deep/start-review-loop.md:420:> **Review fan-out verdict:** strongest-restriction applies — if any lineage has an active P0 finding, the merged verdict is FAIL regardless of other lineages' outcomes.
.opencode/commands/deep/start-review-loop.md:463:- Dimension coverage as convergence signal (all required dimensions must be reviewed)
.opencode/commands/deep/start-review-loop.md:464:- Three binary quality gates (evidence, scope, coverage) must pass before STOP
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:2:title: "Feature Specification: deep-loop native fan-out parallel multi-executor"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:3:description: "Phase parent: add an opt-in fan-out layer above the existing single-executor sequential loop so /deep:start-research-loop and /deep:start-review-loop can run N executor lineages concurrently (capped), each in an isolated sub-packet, then a consumer-specific cross-lineage merge. Single-executor stays the default and byte-identical. Generalizes the proven manual pattern from packet 122."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:5:  - "123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:7:  - "parallel multi-executor deep-research deep-review"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:12:    packet_pointer: "skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:26:# Spec 123 — deep-loop native fan-out parallel multi-executor
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:30:Add an **opt-in fan-out layer ABOVE the existing single-executor sequential loop** for both `/deep:start-research-loop` and `/deep:start-review-loop` (which share the `deep-loop-runtime` peer skill). N executor "lineages" run concurrently with a concurrency cap; each lineage runs the **existing loop verbatim** in its own isolated sub-packet; a consumer-specific cross-lineage merge produces the canonical output (`research.md` / `review-report.md`).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:32:This generalizes the pattern proven manually in packet `122-deep-improvement-skill-benchmark-mode/001-skill-benchmark-deep-research` (a `xargs -P 2` worker pool ran 5×4 models into per-model sub-packets, with a salvage fallback and a status ledger, then a cross-model synthesis). The prototype to mine: `…/122-…/001-skill-benchmark-deep-research/research/run_one.sh`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:34:**Single-executor remains the recommended default and byte-identical to today** — fan-out is opt-in via `--executors`/`--concurrency`; when absent, the existing single-executor path runs unchanged.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:39:- Single-executor default; fan-out opt-in; default path byte-identical (hard parity gate).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:40:- Per-lineage execution = **Option B**: orchestrator shells the existing command per lineage into an isolated sub-packet (`{artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/`) via a new `--artifact-dir-override`, so the YAML loop runs verbatim. Option A (re-implement the loop in JS) rejected — divergence risk.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:41:- Coverage-graph isolation = **per-lineage `session_id`** (collision-free on the shared SQLite, zero schema change; avoids the destructive `SCHEMA_VERSION` migration).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:42:- Convergence stays per-lineage and unchanged (research 0.05 newInfoRatio; review 0.10 weighted P0/P1/P2 + 9 gates + P0-override). No cross-lineage convergence vote; only the merge is consumer-specific.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:46:- Intra-lineage "wave" parallelism (parallelizing iterations within one lineage) — the loop is sequential within a lineage (iteration N depends on N-1 state). Stays reference-only/deferred.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:47:- Changing single-executor behavior, convergence math, or the coverage-graph schema.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:51:- `deep-loop-runtime/lib/council/multi-seat-dispatch.cjs` — parallel `Promise.allSettled` dispatch + per-item status/error isolation; **generalize into a concurrency-capped pool** (the missing piece).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:53:- `deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/{executor-audit,prompt-pack,post-dispatch-validate}.ts` — per-iteration libs reused unchanged (add optional `lineageId` to audit only).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:54:- `coverage-graph/coverage-graph-db.ts` — keys by `(spec_folder, loop_type, session_id, …)`; per-lineage session_id isolates.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:55:- `system-spec-kit/shared/review-research-paths.cjs#resolveArtifactRoot` — artifact dir resolution.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:61:| **001** | `001-schema-config-plumbing/` | Multi-executor schema (`lineageExecutorSchema`, `fanoutConfigSchema`, `parseFanoutConfig`, `expandLineages`) + optional `lineageId` in executor-audit. No behavior change. Parity gate. | — |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:62:| **002** | `002-capped-pool-status-ledger/` | New `scripts/fanout-pool.cjs`: `runCappedPool` (generalize council dispatch + cap) + status JSONL ledger + summary. | 001 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:63:| **003** | `003-per-lineage-spawn-isolation/` | Pool spawn path (Option B) + `--artifact-dir-override` branch in `step_resolve_artifact_root` across all 4 YAMLs; per-lineage sub-packets; recursion-guard check. | 002 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:64:| **004** | `004-salvage-coverage-graph/` | Salvage sweep (reuse post-dispatch-validate; recover stdout→md) + per-lineage session_id coverage-graph isolation (no-collision test). | 003 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:65:| **005** | `005-consumer-merges-synthesis/` | New `scripts/fanout-merge.cjs` (research: dedup+attribution; review: severity rollup + strongest-restriction) + `step_fanout_merge` atop both `phase_synthesis`; `fanout-attribution.md`. | 003, 004 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:66:| **006** | `006-command-surface-docs-parity/` | Command flag parsing (`--executor` repeatable, `--executors`, `--concurrency`) + default policy; SKILL/convergence/runtime doc updates (permit command-driven fan-out, keep wave deferred); final byte-identical parity gate. | 001–005 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:67:| **007** | `007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/` | **Design-only (added after the 001–006 build arc).** Per-iteration model schedule: a fixed-count heterogeneous band sequence (e.g. 9× MiniMax then 1× Opus) modeled as ordered single-executor lineages over the fan-out built in 001–006; closes the contract gap that forced a hand-rolled worker pool in the 122 review. Implementation deferred to the phase's own future work. | 001–006 |
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:73:- Fan-out runs N lineages concurrently (capped), each isolated, producing one merged canonical report; status ledger populated; shared SQLite shows no collision.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:74:- Salvage recovers iterations when an executor doesn't write its file.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:75:- **Single-executor run is byte-identical to pre-change `main`** (config, state.jsonl modulo timestamps, iteration md, research.md/review-report.md) — non-negotiable gate, run at Phase 001 and Phase 006.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:80:- Unit: pool cap + allSettled isolation; fan-out schema (parse/conflict/expand); salvage; both merges.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:81:- Integration: 2-lineage × 2-iter dry run on a throwaway packet (`native` + one cheap CLI).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/spec.md:82:- Parity: single-executor byte-identical to `main`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:3:description: "Design (spec only) a first-class contract-compliant per-iteration model schedule for deep-loop fan-out: an operator requests a fixed-count heterogeneous schedule (e.g. nine iterations on minimax MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed then one on claude-opus-4-8) via /deep:start-review-loop, /deep:start-research-loop, and shared deep-loop-runtime, so future runs never hand-roll a worker pool like packet 122 review did. Models the schedule as ordered single-executor lineages (bands) over existing fan-out via a thin iterationPlan flag desugaring one-to-one into ordered lineages plus minimal sequencing. Produces schema, routing, audit, merge-precedence, command-surface design; implementation is this phase's future work."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:11:    packet_pointer: "skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:27:Design (spec only) a first-class, contract-compliant way for an operator to request a fixed-count heterogeneous per-iteration model schedule through the canonical `/deep:start-review-loop` and `/deep:start-research-loop` commands and the shared `deep-loop-runtime`. Motivating example: nine iterations on `minimax MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed` then one on `claude-opus-4-8`, so future runs never hand-roll a worker pool the way packet 122 review did. This phase produces the schema, routing, audit, merge-precedence, and command-surface design; implementation is this phase's own future work (no code here).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:29:**Background — the packet 122 deviation:** packet 122 review ran a heterogeneous per-iteration model mix by hand-rolling a shell worker pool (`run_one.sh` with a `case` statement assigning per-iteration dimensions and a `xargs`-style fan-out). That bespoke machinery bypassed the shared `deep-loop-runtime` dispatch, the externalized JSONL state machine, and the consumer merge; it worked once but is unreproducible through the supported command surface and violates deep-review forbidden patterns.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:31:**Problem statement — the contract gap:** there is no supported way to express "run band A on model X for N iterations, then band B on model Y for M iterations" through the canonical commands. Existing fan-out (phases 001-006) runs homogeneous lineages concurrently and merges once all complete; it has no ordered heterogeneous per-iteration schedule and no ordered/seeded band sequencing, forcing operators back toward the packet 122 hand-rolled path.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:36:- Schema/flag design: an `iterationPlan` of ordered bands (from-to or count; executor kind and model; optional focus/dimensions; optional dependsOn/order) plus the `iteration-plan` (a.k.a. `model-schedule`) flag desugaring one-to-one into the existing `executors` lineage array, integrated through `step_fanout_spawn`, `step_fanout_spawn_cli`, `fanout-pool.cjs`, `fanout-run.cjs`, `fanout-salvage.cjs`, and `executor-config.ts` (reuse-first; no parallel dispatcher).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:39:- Per-iteration/per-band executor audit and tracing (band and model attribution) in the JSONL state log, deltas, and findings registry; plus merge-precedence as an ordered band-priority list in `fanout-merge.cjs` preserving review severity rollup and research dedup/attribution.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:40:- Contract-compliance and backward-compat design: satisfy every deep-review forbidden pattern (no ad-hoc shell fan-out; no direct CLI loop; no `/tmp` prompt dispatch; no Task-tool agent dispatch; no skipping the JSONL state machine; state under the local review/research packet); preserve read-only, externalized-state, and per-iteration-JSONL contracts; keep single-executor and homogeneous fan-out byte-identical with opt-in absent-by-default fields.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:45:- Any code edits to fan-out scripts, `executor-config.ts`, the auto/confirm YAML, or the deep-review / deep-research / deep-loop-runtime SKILL.md files in this phase.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:46:- Inventing a new parallel orchestration system, worker-pool runtime, or state machine that competes with `step_fanout_spawn` and `fanout-pool.cjs`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:47:- True intra-lineage per-iteration executor rotation inside one continuous loop with cross-lineage iteration interleaving or band-synchronization barriers (rejected in favor of ordered homogeneous lineages unless desugaring proves insufficient).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:49:- New executor kinds/providers/models beyond those registered (minimax, codex, claude, opencode, gemini, devin, native) and changes to the single-executor default path or existing homogeneous fan-out merge semantics.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:50:- Re-litigating or modifying packet 122 hand-rolled artifacts.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:53:- Command surface and one-to-one desugaring into existing fan-out lineages specified; desugaring pinned to real fan-out and `executor-config` entry points.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:56:- Merge precedence keeps the severity-rollup invariant (any active P0 from any band forces merged FAIL).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:61:- **Sequencing gap:** existing fan-out runs lineages concurrently and jumps to synthesis once all complete; band B after band A with optional seeding needs an ordered/`dependsOn` extension to `fanout-pool.cjs` that does not yet exist, so it may be underestimated as pure sugar. Mitigation: front-load research to confirm whether ordering is sugar over concurrency caps or a genuine minimal pool-driver delta, and scope it explicitly.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:62:- **Reuse-vs-rewrite drift:** pressure to match packet 122 per-iteration-dimension UX could tempt true intra-loop executor rotation (the hard path needing band-sync barriers and iteration interleaving). Mitigation: hold the ordered-homogeneous-lineage framing and keep intra-loop rotation out of scope unless desugaring is proven insufficient.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:64:- **Contract-compliance illusion and two-consumer divergence:** a loosely specified band-priority or ordered layer could resemble the forbidden ad-hoc dispatcher, and research dedup/attribution versus review severity-rollup may fit one design unevenly. Mitigation: explicit per-forbidden-pattern mapping; require all dispatch inside `step_fanout_spawn` and the fan-out scripts; specify the band-priority and audit model for both consumers with differences called out.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md:68:Implementation/build of the capability; any code edits; a competing parallel orchestrator; true intra-lineage executor rotation; convergence-math changes; new executor kinds; packet 122 artifact changes (all deferred or excluded per Scope/Out above).
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-model-benchmark-loop_confirm.yaml:126:          - lineage_mode_must_equal_new: "Model-benchmark currently ships only `new` sessions; resume/restart/fork/completed-continue are not runtime-wired."
.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/coverage-graph/README.md:12:Convergence-detection primitives for deep-review and deep-research. Computes dimension coverage, finding stability, P0 resolution rate, evidence density, and hotspot saturation.
.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/coverage-graph/README.md:18:| `coverage-graph-db.ts` | SQLite schema, node-kind allow-list, and connection lifecycle |
.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/coverage-graph/README.md:19:| `coverage-graph-query.ts` | Query builders for coverage gaps, unverified claims, contradictions, and hotspots |
.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/coverage-graph/README.md:20:| `coverage-graph-signals.ts` | Convergence signal extraction and decision scoring |
.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/coverage-graph/README.md:24:- deep-review: convergence detection via `coverage-graph-signals`
.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/coverage-graph/README.md:29:- `lib/deep-loop/` - shared state primitives used alongside coverage-graph
.opencode/commands/deep/ask-ai-council.md:20:>    - `executor.*`
.opencode/commands/deep/ask-ai-council.md:41:  - `executor.*`
.opencode/commands/deep/ask-ai-council.md:44:- **PLANNING BOUNDARY**: deep council writes packet-local `ai-council/**` artifacts only. Implementation remains with the caller or follow-on implementation agents.
.opencode/commands/deep/ask-ai-council.md:45:- **GRAPH BOUNDARY**: derived council graph replay uses `deep-loop-runtime` CLI scripts with `--loop-type council`; `ai-council/**` artifacts remain authoritative.
.opencode/commands/deep/ask-ai-council.md:46:- **ONE CLI PER ROUND**: all seats in a round use one executor boundary. Different CLIs are separate rounds, not mixed seats.
.opencode/commands/deep/ask-ai-council.md:68:1. **Tier 1 - Resolve confidently**: parse `$ARGUMENTS` flags, the `PRE-BOUND SETUP ANSWERS:` block, and the Default Resolution Table below. When every required field is resolved, persist to `{spec_folder}/ai-council/council-session.json` or the YAML-designated setup artifact, bind runtime YAML placeholders, set `STATUS: PASSED`, and load `.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_ask-ai-council_auto.yaml`. End Section 0.

.opencode/commands/deep/ask-ai-council.md:246:**Semantic:** `convergenceThreshold` compares per-topic Round-N to Round-N+1 adjudicator verdict deltas. Lower = more rounds / higher stability requirement.

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:33:  lineage_mode: "[auto|resume|restart] - Session lifecycle intent. Default: auto. The runtime only persists lineage events for `resume` (same sessionId, no archive) and `restart` (new sessionId, generation+1, prior review/ archived). `fork` and `completed-continue` are deferred and no longer accepted — see deep-review/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branches."

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:115:  step_resolve_artifact_root:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:116:    description: "Resolve artifact directory — use fan-out lineage override when provided, else resolve from spec_folder"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:117:    note: "Root specs keep review artifacts directly in {spec_folder}/review/. Child phases and sub-phases keep local packet directories in {spec_folder}/review/{packet}/, and archives stay local at {spec_folder}/review_archive/{packet}/."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:118:    branch_on: "config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:121:        artifact_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:122:        artifact_root_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:123:        artifact_subfolder: null
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:124:        artifact_archive_root: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}/_archive"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:128:        - artifact_root_dir: "Resolved local review owner directory"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:129:        - artifact_subfolder: "Local packet subfolder ({ownerSlug}-pt-{NN}), else null"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:130:        - artifact_dir: "Resolved review packet directory for this target"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:131:        - artifact_archive_root: "Resolved local review archive directory for this target"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:133:  step_fanout_spawn:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:134:    description: "Spawn fan-out lineages; skip and proceed to phase_init normally when single-executor"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:135:    skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:137:      Fan-out mode is active. Spawn all lineages. Each lineage runs the full loop in its own
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:138:      isolated sub-packet under {artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/.
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:139:      After all lineages complete, jump directly to phase_synthesis — skip phase_init and
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:140:      phase_main_loop entirely (those are the single-executor path). The merge step in
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:141:      phase_synthesis will consolidate results across all lineages.
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:143:      step_fanout_spawn_cli:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:144:        description: "Spawn all CLI lineages in capped worker pool"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:145:        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind != 'native'"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:147:          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-run.cjs \
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:150:            --fanout-config-json '{config.fanout_json}' \
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:151:            --base-artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:154:      step_fanout_spawn_native:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:155:        description: "Dispatch each native lineage as a sequential deep-review sub-agent"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:156:        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind == 'native'"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:157:        for_each: "lineage in expanded native entries of config.fanout"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:164:              config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir: {artifact_dir}/lineages/{lineage.label}
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:165:              session_id: fanout-{lineage.label}-{fanout_run_id}
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:166:              executor: native
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:191:        action: "Detect resource-map.md before config creation so init can persist coverage-gate state"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:199:          - resource_map_known_context: "When present: concise resource-map snapshot for Known Context and charter framing. When absent: 'resource-map.md not present; skipping coverage gate'."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:202:        action: "Rehome legacy review artifacts into review/iterations before session classification"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:230:        on_canonical_present: "Leave canonical review/ state untouched and do not overwrite it with legacy scratch artifacts."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:243:          fresh: "None of the three state artifacts exist"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:245:          completed-session: "Resume artifacts exist and config.status == 'complete'"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:250:          log: "Auto-resume: state artifacts are complete and consistent. Continue the same lineage (sessionId unchanged, generation unchanged, no archive)."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:251:          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"resumed","mode":"review","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{session_id}","lineageMode":"resume","continuedFromRun":{iteration_count},"generation":{generation},"archivedPath":null,"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:254:          action: "Archive the current review packet under the root-level review_archive/ tree and start a new lineage segment with a fresh sessionId and generation+1."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:257:            lineage_mode: "restart"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:260:          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"restarted","mode":"review","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{prior_session_id}","lineageMode":"restart","generation":{generation},"archivedPath":"{state_paths.archive_root}/{timestamp_slug}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:262:        note_deferred_branches: "fork and completed-continue are deferred and no longer runtime-supported in this release. The reducer still reads `lineageMode` from config for dashboards and analysis, but only `new`, `resume`, and `restart` are live. See deep-review/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branches for the one-session contract."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:264:          log: "Prior session already completed. Either archive the completed review/ tree and start a fresh session, or jump straight to synthesis with the existing artifacts."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:277:            2. Discover implementation files referenced in spec artifacts
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:293:            3. Set scope = all child spec artifacts
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:306:          1. Iteration 0 (inventory pass): Build artifact map, identify file types, estimate complexity
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:339:          lineageMode: "new"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:369:        action: "Initialize JSONL state log with config record including review fields and lineage metadata"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:373:        content: '{"type":"config","mode":"review","reviewTarget":"{review_target}","reviewTargetType":"{review_target_type}","reviewDimensions":{review_dimensions_json},"resource_map_present":{resource_map_present},"resource_map":{"emit":{resource_map_emit}},"sessionId":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","parentSessionId":null,"lineageMode":"new","generation":1,"continuedFromRun":null,"maxIterations":{max_iterations},"convergenceThreshold":{convergence_threshold},"createdAt":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","specFolder":"{spec_folder}"}'
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:378:        content: '{"sessionId":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","generation":1,"lineageMode":"new","openFindings":[],"resolvedFindings":[],"repeatedFindings":[],"dimensionCoverage":{"correctness":false,"security":false,"traceability":false,"maintainability":false},"findingsBySeverity":{"P0":0,"P1":0,"P2":0},"openFindingsCount":0,"resolvedFindingsCount":0,"convergenceScore":0.0}'
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:403:        note: "When resource_map_present is true, append the resource_map_known_context snapshot and add Resource Map Coverage to the Review Charter. When false, append 'resource-map.md not present; skipping coverage gate'."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:435:          - dimension_coverage: "covered / total dimensions"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:436:          - coverage_age: "Iterations since dimension coverage last changed; require >= 1 before STOP"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:441:          - resource_map_prompt_line: "If resource_map_present is true, return 'Resource Map Coverage: cross-check target_files from {spec_folder}/applied/T-*.md against {spec_folder}/resource-map.md and classify only missed coverage as gaps.' Else return 'Resource Map Coverage: resource-map.md not present; skipping coverage gate.'"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:450:          - fix_completeness_replay_passing_rows: "Count required replay rows marked PASS with file:line or command evidence and producer/consumer/matrix coverage."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:465:        action: "Evaluate coverage-graph convergence before the inline review convergence vote"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:470:          1. Call graph convergence on the current review lineage before the inline 3-signal vote.
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:499:             b) if all dimensions clean AND required traceability protocols are covered AND p0_count == 0 AND p1_count == 0 AND coverage_age >= 1 AND all quality gates pass (evidence: every P0/P1 has file:line; scope: all findings within target; coverage: all dimensions reviewed): mark hard_stop_reason = "all_dimensions_clean" and promote to STOP candidate
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:515:               c) Dimension coverage (w=0.45):
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:516:                  coverage = dimensions_covered / total_dimensions
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:517:                  stop if coverage >= 1.0 AND required traceability protocols are covered AND coverage_age >= 1
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:523:               b) dimensionCoverageGate: pass when configured dimensions and required traceability coverage are complete and coverage_age >= 1; record covered and missing dimensions
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:528:               g) fixCompletenessReplayGate: pass when security_sensitive_fix_scope == false OR every required closed-gate replay row passes with file:line or command evidence and producer/consumer/matrix coverage; record security_sensitive_fix_scope, fix_completeness_replay_required_rows, and fix_completeness_replay_passing_rows
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:529:               h) candidateCoverageGate: skip entirely when `reviewDepthSchemaVersion` is not 2 on the latest iteration. Otherwise pass when the current iteration's `reviewDepthApplicability.scopeClass` is `trivial` with `enforcement: "skip"` AND `reviewDepthApplicability.evidenceRefs` is non-empty, OR when the reducer registry's `searchDebt` is empty AND `candidateCoverage.covered` is a superset of `searchCoverage.requiredBugClasses` for the lineage. Otherwise pass = false; record `searchDebt` items as blocked-stop evidence; blocker name = "candidateCoverageGate"; recovery_strategy = "Resolve deferred/blocked obligations in next iteration or downgrade scope explicitly to trivial with cited evidence."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:535:               blocked_by_json = JSON array of failing gate names (always include "claimAdjudicationGate" when claim_adjudication_gate_pass == false, "fixCompletenessReplayGate" when fix_completeness_replay_gate_pass == false, "candidateCoverageGate" when candidate_coverage_gate_pass == false, and "graphlessFallbackGate" when graphless_fallback_gate_pass == false)
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:539:               dimension_coverage_gate_pass = boolean
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:540:               dimension_coverage_gate_covered_json = JSON array of covered review dimensions
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:541:               dimension_coverage_gate_missing_json = JSON array of missing review dimensions
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:553:               candidate_coverage_gate_pass = boolean
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:554:               candidate_coverage_search_debt_json = JSON array of reducer-owned searchDebt obligations blocking STOP, else []
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:555:               candidate_coverage_missing_json = JSON array of required bug classes not present in candidateCoverage.covered, else []
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:574:                    recovery_strategy = "Resolve review coverage-graph blockers before stopping."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:588:          - dimension_coverage_gate_pass: "Boolean pass/fail for dimensionCoverageGate"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:589:          - dimension_coverage_gate_covered_json: "JSON array of covered review dimensions"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:590:          - dimension_coverage_gate_missing_json: "JSON array of missing review dimensions"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:602:          - candidate_coverage_gate_pass: "Boolean pass/fail for candidateCoverageGate (false vetoes STOP for unresolved reducer-owned search debt or uncovered required bug classes)"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:603:          - candidate_coverage_search_debt_json: "JSON array of reducer-owned searchDebt obligations used as blocked-stop evidence"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:604:          - candidate_coverage_missing_json: "JSON array of required bug classes missing from candidateCoverage.covered"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:618:          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"blocked_stop","mode":"review","run":{current_iteration},"blockedBy":{blocked_by_json},"gateResults":{"convergenceGate":{"pass":{convergence_gate_pass},"score":{convergence_gate_score}},"dimensionCoverageGate":{"pass":{dimension_coverage_gate_pass},"covered":{dimension_coverage_gate_covered_json},"missing":{dimension_coverage_gate_missing_json}},"p0ResolutionGate":{"pass":{p0_resolution_gate_pass},"activeP0":{active_p0_count}},"evidenceDensityGate":{"pass":{evidence_density_gate_pass},"avgEvidencePerFinding":{avg_evidence_per_finding}},"hotspotSaturationGate":{"pass":{hotspot_saturation_gate_pass}},"claimAdjudicationGate":{"pass":{claim_adjudication_gate_pass},"activeP0P1":{claim_adjudication_active_count}},"fixCompletenessReplayGate":{"pass":{fix_completeness_replay_gate_pass},"securitySensitive":{security_sensitive_fix_scope},"requiredRows":{fix_completeness_replay_required_rows},"passingRows":{fix_completeness_replay_passing_rows}},"candidateCoverageGate":{"pass":{candidate_coverage_gate_pass},"searchDebt":{candidate_coverage_search_debt_json},"missing":{candidate_coverage_missing_json}},"graphlessFallbackGate":{"pass":{graphless_fallback_gate_pass},"mode":"{graphless_fallback_mode}","missing":{graphless_fallback_missing_json},"unavailabilityReason":"{graphless_fallback_unavailability_reason}"}},"graphBlockerDetail":{graph_blockers_json},"recoveryStrategy":"{recovery_strategy}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{session_id}","generation":{generation}}'
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:636:          pivot_target: "Pivot to the least-covered dimension (the review dimension with the fewest iteration passes and lowest coverage ratio)."

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:675:          Coverage Age: {coverage_age}

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:1278:      step_resource_map_coverage_gate:

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:1331:             - Convergence summary, coverage summary, ruled-out claims, sources reviewed
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:1334:          Preserve machine-owned markers so the reducer-owned registry, dashboard, and strategy anchors can be refreshed on re-run without mutating prior synthesis. (Note: `completed-continue` lineage branch is deferred — see `deep-review/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branches`.)
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:1339:        append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"synthesis_complete","mode":"review","totalIterations":{iteration_count},"activeP0":{active_p0},"activeP1":{active_p1},"activeP2":{active_p2},"dimensionCoverage":{dimension_coverage},"verdict":"{verdict}","releaseReadinessState":"{release_readiness_state}","stopReason":"{reason}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:1347:      step_stage_artifact_dir:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:1348:        action: "Stage all skill-owned artifacts under artifact_dir for the operator's next git commit"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:1349:        command: "git add {state_paths.artifact_dir}"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:1350:        note: "Skill-owned contract fix (028): without this stage step, operators who do `git add review-report.md` lose the iteration trail (iterations/, deltas/, state.jsonl, strategy, findings-registry, etc.). Staging the whole artifact_dir keeps the audit trail intact. Operators retain commit authority and can `git restore --staged {path}` to unstage anything before commit. Failure is non-fatal — log warning and continue."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-review-loop_auto.yaml:1351:        on_fail: "Log warning. Do not block synthesis. The artifact_dir may be outside a git repo (e.g., temp test fixture) which is a valid case."

.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:3:argument-hint: "<topic> [:auto|:confirm] [--max-iterations=N] [--convergence=N] [--executor=<type> [--model=X] [--count=N] [--label=X] ...] [--executors=<json>] [--concurrency=N] (:auto supports PRE-BOUND SETUP ANSWERS: prompt-body block for non-interactive setup)"
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:60:1. **Tier 1 — Resolve confidently** (contract §1): parse `$ARGUMENTS` flags + `PRE-BOUND SETUP ANSWERS:` block (§2) + the Default Resolution Table below (§3). When every required field is resolved, persist to `{artifact_dir}/deep-research-config.json` (shape: `researchTopic`, `specFolder`, `maxIterations`, `convergenceThreshold`, `executionMode: "auto"`, `resource_map.emit`, `config.executor.*`), bind runtime YAML placeholders, set `STATUS: PASSED`, load `.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml`. End §0.
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:79:  executor: native  # native | cli-codex | cli-gemini | cli-claude-code | cli-opencode | cli-devin
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:80:  executor_model: ""  # optional executor-specific model id
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:81:  executor_reasoning: ""  # optional reasoning effort
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:82:  executor_service_tier: ""  # optional service tier
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:83:  executor_timeout: 900  # optional positive integer seconds
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:98:| `executor` | N | flag `--executor`, marker `executor`, config file, or default | `native` | N |
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:99:| `executor_model` | N | flag `--model`, marker `executor_model`, or executor-specific validation | none | N |
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:100:| `executor_reasoning` | N | flag `--reasoning-effort`, marker `executor_reasoning`, or executor default | none | N |
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:101:| `executor_service_tier` | N | flag `--service-tier`, marker `executor_service_tier`, or executor default | none | N |
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:102:| `executor_timeout` | N | flag `--executor-timeout`, marker `executor_timeout`, or default | `900` | N |
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:104:| `fanout_executors` | N | repeatable `--executor=<type>` flags or `--executors=<json>`; each `--executor` group accepts `--model`, `--reasoning-effort`, `--service-tier`, `--executor-timeout`, `--iters`, `--label`, `--count` | none (single-executor when absent) | N |
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:105:| `fanout_concurrency` | N | flag `--concurrency=N` | `2` | N |
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:107:**Fan-out default policy:** 0–1 `--executor` flags and no `--executors` → `config.executor` (single-executor, default, unchanged). 2+ `--executor` flags, `--executors`, or any `--count > 1` → `config.fanout`. Native fan-out (count N for `native` executor) runs N sequential `@deep-research` agent dispatches with isolated dirs. CLI fan-out runs N headless subprocesses concurrently in the capped pool.
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:128:   |-- --executor=<type> -> config.executor.type (`native` | `cli-codex` | `cli-gemini` | `cli-claude-code` | `cli-opencode` | `cli-devin`)
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:129:   |-- --model=<id> -> config.executor.model (for example `gpt-5.4`)
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:130:   |-- --reasoning-effort=<level> -> config.executor.reasoningEffort (`none` | `minimal` | `low` | `medium` | `high` | `xhigh`)
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:131:   |-- --service-tier=<tier> -> config.executor.serviceTier (`priority` | `standard` | `fast`)
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:132:   |-- --executor-timeout=<seconds> -> config.executor.timeoutSeconds (positive integer, default `900`)
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:134:   |-- --executor=<type> [--model=X] [--reasoning-effort=Y] [--service-tier=Z] [--executor-timeout=N] [--iters=N] [--label=X] [--count=N]
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:135:   |     (repeatable; each occurrence adds one entry to config.fanout.executors)
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:136:   |-- --executors=<json> -> config.fanout.executors = parse(json) escape hatch for complex configs
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:137:   |-- --concurrency=N -> config.fanout.concurrency (default 2)
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:140:   |   - 0 or 1 --executor (no --executors, no count>1): write config.executor (single, unchanged)
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:141:   |   - 2+ --executor flags, --executors, or any count>1: write config.fanout
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:143:   +-- Defaults: maxIterations=10, convergenceThreshold=0.05, config.executor.type=`native`, config.executor.timeoutSeconds=900, config.resource_map.emit=`true`
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:147:   - The generated `deep-research-config.json` stores executor settings under `config.executor.*`
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:150:   - `--executor` -> `config.executor.type`
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:151:   - `--model` -> `config.executor.model`
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:152:   - `--reasoning-effort` -> `config.executor.reasoningEffort`
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:153:   - `--service-tier` -> `config.executor.serviceTier`
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:154:   - `--executor-timeout` -> `config.executor.timeoutSeconds`
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:157:   - `parseExecutorConfig` from `.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts` runs at config-write time
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:158:   - Invalid combinations fail fast with clear errors, including `cli-codex` without `--model` and reserved-but-unwired executor kinds
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:168:   - Include Q-Exec only when `--executor` is NOT present and the topic text does NOT already mention executor hints such as `cli-codex`, `codex`, or `gpt-5.4`
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:169:   - If Q-Exec is omitted and no executor is otherwise resolved, default to `native`
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:209:   - executor config = [CLI flags, compact reply, config file, or default `native`; map compact reply fields to `config.executor.type/model/reasoningEffort/serviceTier`, and accept an optional volunteered convergence value before executor fields]
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:259:Run an iterative loop for deep research: Initialize state under `{artifact_dir}` (resolved via `resolveArtifactRoot()` — root specs use `{spec_folder}/research/`; child phases and sub-phases use `{spec_folder}/research/{packet}-pt-{NN}/`), dispatch `@deep-research` agent per iteration, evaluate convergence, synthesize findings into `{artifact_dir}/research.md`, and emit `{artifact_dir}/resource-map.md` at convergence unless `--no-resource-map` disables it. Use when deep investigation requiring multiple rounds of discovery.
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:266:**Outputs:** Spec folder with `{artifact_dir}/` packet (`{spec_folder}/research/` for root specs or `{spec_folder}/research/{packet}-pt-{NN}/` for nested phases), `research.md`, optional `resource-map.md`, state files, and `STATUS=<OK|FAIL|CANCELLED>`
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:357:# Single-executor (default — unchanged)
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:362:# Fan-out: two CLI lineages in parallel (cli-codex + cli-claude-code)
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:364:  --executor=cli-codex --model=o4-mini --label=codex \
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:365:  --executor=cli-claude-code --model=claude-opus-4-8 --label=claude \
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:366:  --concurrency=2
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:368:# Fan-out: native (sequential agent dispatches) + CLI lineages mixed
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:370:  --executor=native --count=1 --label=native \
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:371:  --executor=cli-codex --model=o4-mini --count=2 \
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:372:  --concurrency=3
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:376:  --executors='[{"kind":"cli-codex","model":"o4-mini","label":"codex","count":3},{"kind":"cli-claude-code","model":"claude-opus-4-8","label":"claude","count":2}]' \
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:377:  --concurrency=4
.opencode/commands/deep/start-research-loop.md:380:> **Note on native fan-out:** `--executor=native --count=N` dispatches N sequential `@deep-research` sub-agents with isolated artifact dirs. Not pooled. Best for count 1–3. For higher parallelism, use CLI executor kinds.
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-agent-improvement-loop_auto.yaml:122:          - lineage_mode_must_equal_new: "Improve-agent currently ships only `new` sessions; resume/restart/fork/completed-continue are not runtime-wired."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-agent-improvement-loop_auto.yaml:160:      step_record_candidate_lineage:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-agent-improvement-loop_auto.yaml:161:        description: "Record the generated candidate in the packet-local lineage graph"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-agent-improvement-loop_auto.yaml:162:        command: "node -e \"const lineage=require('./.opencode/skills/deep-improvement/scripts/agent-improvement/candidate-lineage.cjs'); lineage.recordCandidate('{spec_folder}/improvement/candidate-lineage.json',{candidateId:'{candidate_id}',sessionId:'{session_id}',waveIndex:0,mutationType:'candidate-proposal',parentCandidateId:null,iteration:Number('{iteration}')});\""
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-agent-improvement-loop_auto.yaml:169:      step_record_mutation_coverage:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-agent-improvement-loop_auto.yaml:170:        description: "Record mutation coverage and per-dimension trajectory from the scored candidate"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-agent-improvement-loop_auto.yaml:171:        command: "node -e \"const fs=require('node:fs'); const coverage=require('./.opencode/skills/deep-improvement/scripts/shared/mutation-coverage.cjs'); const score=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('{score_output_path}','utf8')); const dimensions=Array.isArray(score.dimensions)?score.dimensions:[]; const scores=Object.fromEntries(dimensions.map((entry)=>[entry.name,entry.score])); coverage.recordMutation('{spec_folder}/improvement/mutation-coverage.json',{dimension:'composite',mutationType:'candidate-proposal',candidateId:'{candidate_id}',iteration:Number('{iteration}'),outcome:score.recommendation||'scored'}); coverage.recordTrajectory('{spec_folder}/improvement/mutation-coverage.json',{iteration:Number('{iteration}'),scores,weightedScore:Number('{weighted_score}')});\""
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/description.json:2:  "specFolder": "skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/description.json:3:  "description": "Spec 123 — deep-loop native fan-out parallel multi-executor",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/description.json:11:    "multi-executor"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/description.json:15:  "folderSlug": "deep-loop-parallel-fanout",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/description.json:21:    "30-05-26_15-31__strongest-restriction-for-review-any-lineage.md"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/plan.md:7:Model an iteration schedule as an ordered sequence of single-executor lineages (bands) inside the existing fan-out machinery, not as new intra-loop executor rotation. Reframe "nine times M2.7 then one time Opus" as two homogeneous bands the system already supports: band A executor `minimax MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed` iterations 9; band B executor `claude-opus-4-8` iterations 1, `dependsOn` A. Add a thin `iterationPlan` flag (a.k.a. `model-schedule`) over the existing `executors` schema that desugars one-to-one into ordered lineages plus a minimal sequencing hint, reusing `step_fanout_spawn`, `step_fanout_spawn_cli`, `fanout-pool.cjs`, `fanout-run.cjs`, `fanout-salvage.cjs`, `fanout-merge.cjs`, and `executor-config.ts`. Per-band focus/dimensions become optional fields threaded into existing per-iteration prompt construction; merge precedence (Opus overrides MiniMax on conflict) is an ordered band-priority list consumed by `fanout-merge.cjs`, keeping severity rollup as an invariant above priority. Single-executor and homogeneous fan-out stay byte-identical; the mode is opt-in, absent-by-default. Reuse the deep-research-before-build convention if siblings use it, front-loading research to lock the desugaring contract against the real fan-out APIs.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/plan.md:11:2. T2: front-loaded research — document real interfaces of `executor-config.ts`, `step_fanout_spawn`/`step_fanout_spawn_cli` (both auto YAMLs), `fanout-pool.cjs`, `fanout-run.cjs`, `fanout-salvage.cjs`, `fanout-merge.cjs`; capture exact entry points and the desugaring target fields.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/plan.md:12:3. T3: design the `iterationPlan` schema and the iteration-plan/model-schedule flag — ordered bands, string sugar, validation, one-to-one desugaring into the `executors` lineage array.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/plan.md:13:4. T4: specify desugaring and dispatch integration — `step_fanout_spawn`/`step_fanout_spawn_cli` consume desugared lineages through `fanout-pool.cjs`/`fanout-run.cjs` unchanged; per-lineage artifact-dir isolation, session id, per-kind state-dir per band.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/plan.md:16:7. T7: specify per-iteration/per-band audit — band and model attribution in the JSONL state log, deltas, and findings registry (both consumers).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/plan.md:17:8. T8: specify merge precedence — ordered band-priority list in `fanout-merge.cjs` for conflict resolution, preserving the severity-rollup invariant for review and dedup/attribution for research.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/graph-metadata.json:3:  "packet_id": "skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/graph-metadata.json:4:  "spec_folder": "skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/graph-metadata.json:5:  "parent_id": "skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/graph-metadata.json:19:      "ordered single-executor lineages",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/graph-metadata.json:23:      "ordered band-priority merge precedence",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/graph-metadata.json:31:      ".opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/spec.md",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/graph-metadata.json:32:      ".opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/plan.md",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/graph-metadata.json:33:      ".opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/tasks.md",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/graph-metadata.json:34:      ".opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/checklist.md"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/graph-metadata.json:36:    "causal_summary": "Design-only phase that closes the packet 122 contract gap by specifying a per-iteration model schedule as ordered single-executor lineages over the existing fan-out machinery, with a thin iterationPlan flag desugaring one-to-one into ordered lineages plus minimal sequencing, ordered band-priority merge precedence preserving the severity-rollup invariant, per-band focus and audit attribution, and a byte-identical opt-in guarantee; implementation is deferred to this phase's future work."

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:111:    description: "Resolve artifact directory — use fan-out lineage override when provided, else resolve from spec_folder"

Child phases and sub-phases keep local packet directories in {spec_folder}/research/{packet}/, and archives stay local at {spec_folder}/research_archive/{packet}/."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:113:    branch_on: "config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir"

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:124:        - artifact_subfolder: "Local packet subfolder ({ownerSlug}-pt-{NN}), else null"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:125:        - artifact_dir: "Resolved research packet directory for this target"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:126:        - artifact_archive_root: "Resolved local research archive directory for this target"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:128:  step_fanout_spawn:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:129:    description: "Spawn fan-out lineages; skip and proceed to phase_init normally when single-executor"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:130:    skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:132:      Fan-out mode is active. Spawn all lineages. Each lineage runs the full loop in its own
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:133:      isolated sub-packet under {artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/.
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:134:      After all lineages complete, jump directly to phase_synthesis — skip phase_init and
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:135:      phase_main_loop entirely (those are the single-executor path). The merge step in
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:136:      phase_synthesis will consolidate results across all lineages.
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:138:      step_fanout_spawn_cli:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:139:        description: "Spawn all CLI lineages in capped worker pool"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:140:        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind != 'native'"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:142:          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-run.cjs \
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:145:            --fanout-config-json '{config.fanout_json}' \
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:146:            --base-artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:149:      step_fanout_spawn_native:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:150:        description: "Dispatch each native lineage as a sequential deep-research sub-agent"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:151:        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind == 'native'"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:152:        for_each: "lineage in expanded native entries of config.fanout"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:159:              config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir: {artifact_dir}/lineages/{lineage.label}
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:160:              session_id: fanout-{lineage.label}-{fanout_run_id}
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:161:              executor: native
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:186:        action: "Resolve canonical research packet artifact names before classification"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:209:          fresh: "None of the three state artifacts exist"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:211:          completed-session: "Resume artifacts exist and config.status == 'complete'"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:221:              lineage_mode: "resume"

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:228:              lineage_mode: "restart"

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:236:          note: "fork and completed-continue branches are deferred. The reducer still reads `lineageMode` from config for dashboards and analysis, but only `new`, `resume`, and `restart` are runtime-supported in this release. See deep-research/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md `Session Lifecycle` for the canonical one-session model."

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:734:            serviceTier: "{config.executor.serviceTier}"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:763:          bash: "node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/upsert.cjs --spec-folder \"{spec_folder}\" --loop-type \"research\" --session-id \"{config.lineage.sessionId}\" --nodes '{graph_upsert_nodes_json}' --edges '{graph_upsert_edges_json}'"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:842:      step_fanout_merge:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:843:        description: "Merge N lineage registries into one consolidated registry; skip when single-executor"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:844:        skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:846:          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-merge.cjs \
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:848:            --artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:894:        on_C: { action: "Cancel synthesis, keep artifacts", status: "PARTIAL" }
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:902:        action: "Emit {state_paths.resource_map_output} from converged research deltas unless config.resource_map.emit is false"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:926:          Preserve machine-owned markers so the reducer-owned registry, dashboard, and strategy anchors can be refreshed on re-run without mutating prior synthesis. (Note: `completed-continue` lineage branch is deferred — see `deep-research/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branch Contract`.)
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:991:      step_stage_artifact_dir:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:992:        action: "Stage all skill-owned artifacts under artifact_dir for the operator's next git commit"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:993:        command: "git add {state_paths.artifact_dir}"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:994:        note: "Skill-owned contract fix (028): without this stage step, operators who do `git add research-report.md` lose the iteration trail (iterations/, deltas/, state.jsonl, strategy, etc.). Staging the whole artifact_dir keeps the audit trail intact. Operators retain commit authority and can `git restore --staged {path}` to unstage anything before commit. Failure is non-fatal — log warning and continue."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_confirm.yaml:995:        on_fail: "Log warning. Do not block synthesis. The artifact_dir may be outside a git repo (e.g., temp test fixture) which is a valid case."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/implementation-summary.md:3:description: "Design-only phase: no code shipped. Captures the planned design for a per-iteration model schedule (iterationPlan flag) modeled as ordered single-executor lineages over existing fan-out, the candidate entry points it must desugar into, and the open design questions to resolve during T2 front-loaded research before any build."
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/implementation-summary.md:11:    packet_pointer: "skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule"

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/implementation-summary.md:39:   into the existing `executors` fan-out lineage array. Reuse-first: no parallel dispatcher.

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/implementation-summary.md:43:   ledger), `fanout-run.cjs` (CLI lineage driver + per-lineage artifact-dir override),
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/implementation-summary.md:44:   `fanout-salvage.cjs`, and `fanout-merge.cjs`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/implementation-summary.md:49:5. **Audit/attribution** — band and model attribution in the JSONL state log, deltas, and
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/implementation-summary.md:51:6. **Merge precedence** — ordered band-priority list in `fanout-merge.cjs` for conflict
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/implementation-summary.md:55:All new fields opt-in/absent-by-default. Single-executor and existing homogeneous fan-out must
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/implementation-summary.md:60:- Prove byte-identical single-executor and homogeneous fan-out output when iterationPlan is
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/implementation-summary.md:63:  forces merged FAIL).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/tasks.md:9:- [ ] T2: Front-loaded research (deep-research-before-build) — document real interfaces of executor-config.ts, step_fanout_spawn + step_fanout_spawn_cli (both auto YAMLs), fanout-pool.cjs, fanout-run.cjs, fanout-salvage.cjs, fanout-merge.cjs; capture exact entry points and the desugaring target fields.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/tasks.md:10:- [ ] T3: Design the iterationPlan schema + iteration-plan/model-schedule flag — ordered bands (from-to or count; executor kind and model; optional focus/dimensions; optional dependsOn/order), string sugar, validation, one-to-one desugaring into the executors lineage array.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/tasks.md:11:- [ ] T4: Specify desugaring + dispatch integration — step_fanout_spawn + step_fanout_spawn_cli consume desugared lineages through fanout-pool.cjs + fanout-run.cjs unchanged; per-lineage artifact-dir isolation, session id, per-kind state-dir per band.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/tasks.md:14:- [ ] T7: Specify per-iteration/per-band audit + tracing — band and model attribution in the JSONL state log, deltas, and findings registry (both consumers).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/123-deep-loop-parallel-fanout/007-native-per-iteration-model-schedule/tasks.md:15:- [ ] T8: Specify merge precedence — ordered band-priority list in fanout-merge.cjs for conflict resolution (Opus band overrides MiniMax band), preserving the severity-rollup invariant for review and dedup/attribution for research.

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:96:  # step_resolve_artifact_root plus the shared resolver, so root specs keep root-local

.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:117:  resource_map_output: "{artifact_dir}/resource-map.md"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:118:  archive_root: "{artifact_archive_root}"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:119:  synthesis_snapshot_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/synthesis-v{generation}.md"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:126:  step_resolve_artifact_root:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:127:    description: "Resolve artifact directory — use fan-out lineage override when provided, else resolve from spec_folder"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:128:    note: "Root specs keep research artifacts directly in {spec_folder}/research/. Child phases and sub-phases keep local packet directories in {spec_folder}/research/{packet}/, and archives stay local at {spec_folder}/research_archive/{packet}/."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:129:    branch_on: "config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:132:        artifact_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:133:        artifact_root_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:134:        artifact_subfolder: null
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:135:        artifact_archive_root: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}/_archive"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:139:        - artifact_root_dir: "Resolved local research owner directory"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:140:        - artifact_subfolder: "Local packet subfolder ({ownerSlug}-pt-{NN}), else null"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:141:        - artifact_dir: "Resolved research packet directory for this target"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:142:        - artifact_archive_root: "Resolved local research archive directory for this target"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:144:  step_fanout_spawn:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:145:    description: "Spawn fan-out lineages; skip and proceed to phase_init normally when single-executor"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:146:    skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:148:      Fan-out mode is active. Spawn all lineages. Each lineage runs the full loop in its own
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:149:      isolated sub-packet under {artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/.
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:150:      After all lineages complete, jump directly to phase_synthesis — skip phase_init and
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:151:      phase_main_loop entirely (those are the single-executor path). The merge step in
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:152:      phase_synthesis will consolidate results across all lineages.
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:154:      step_fanout_spawn_cli:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:155:        description: "Spawn all CLI lineages in capped worker pool"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:156:        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind != 'native'"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:158:          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-run.cjs \
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:161:            --fanout-config-json '{config.fanout_json}' \
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:162:            --base-artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:165:      step_fanout_spawn_native:
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:166:        description: "Dispatch each native lineage as a sequential deep-research sub-agent"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:167:        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind == 'native'"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:168:        for_each: "lineage in expanded native entries of config.fanout"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:175:              config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir: {artifact_dir}/lineages/{lineage.label}
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:176:              session_id: fanout-{lineage.label}-{fanout_run_id}
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:177:              executor: native
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:210:          - resource_map_known_context: "When present: summarize the map by section with entry counts across READMEs, Documents, Commands, Agents, Skills, Specs, Scripts, Tests, Config, and Meta, plus a one-line theme summary for each section. When absent: 'resource-map.md not present; skipping coverage gate'."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:213:        action: "Resolve canonical research packet artifact names before classification"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:249:          fresh: "None of the three state artifacts exist"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:251:          completed-session: "Resume artifacts exist and config.status == 'complete'"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:260:          log: "Auto-resume: state artifacts are complete and consistent. Continue the same lineage (sessionId unchanged, generation unchanged, no archive)."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:261:          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"resumed","mode":"research","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{session_id}","lineageMode":"resume","continuedFromRun":{iteration_count},"generation":{generation},"archivedPath":null,"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:264:          action: "Archive the current research packet under the root-level research_archive/ tree and start a new lineage segment with a fresh sessionId and generation+1."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:267:            lineage_mode: "restart"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:270:          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"restarted","mode":"research","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{prior_session_id}","lineageMode":"restart","generation":{generation},"archivedPath":"{state_paths.archive_root}/{timestamp_slug}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:272:        note_deferred_branches: "fork and completed-continue are deferred and no longer runtime-supported in this release. The reducer still reads `lineageMode` from config for dashboards and analysis, but only `new`, `resume`, and `restart` are live. See deep-research/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branch Contract for the one-session contract."
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:302:          lineage.sessionId: "{AUTO_SESSION_ID}"
.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml:303:          lineage.parentSessionId: null
